friday_2026_06_05.rationale: Settled weather with no rain forecast; light winds; ground will benefit from Friday dry conditions.

saturday_2026_06_06.rationale: Patchy rain/occasional showers forecast (0.9mm); cooler at 18°C; some moisture expected but unlikely to soften further unless Friday overnight rain is significant.

history_source.enrichment_cost: Manual review of each horse's Racing Post form history page to extract per-run going; estimated 10-15 mins per horse at full complexity. Automated scrape via Racing Post API (if available) would reduce to ~2 mins per card. Alternative: Sporting Life form tool or At The Races replays (video-based, higher effort).

notes: Epsom Downs official going updates page returns 404; relying on weather data. Racecards JSON includes meeting-level going forecast but not per-run historical going for each horse's form string. Kaylee's going-fit scoring will require enrichment step before implementation.
